sentences.text: It is a pleasure to hear you talk about friendship.
Even the clergyman, who lives in a big house and wears a gold ring, could not say such beautiful things as you do.
The Miller's youngest son asked, 'Could we invite little Hans to our house?'
He said, 'If Hans is having a hard time, I will share my porridge and show him my white rabbits.'
